test.name: Quality tombstoned (deleted on FS) degrades gracefully; warnings still run
test.description: User asks to check KD96-TV5, a duplicate that was DELETED on FamilySearch after this project last synced. It is still in the local tree, so person_warnings runs offline and returns nothing. person_quality returns a tombstoned error. The skill should surface the tombstoned state as a one-line note in the quality section and STILL report the offline warnings result -- a person_quality failure must never suppress person_warnings.

judge_context: Should call both person_warnings and person_quality with personId 'KD96-TV5'
Should report the offline person_warnings result (no impossibilities) -- this must appear regardless of the quality failure

Should surface the tombstoned state as a brief note in the quality section (the person was deleted or merged on FamilySearch, so there is no quality score) -- using the tool's returned message; do NOT treat it as a fatal error that aborts the report
Should NOT invent a quality score or issues for a person that has none
